summary: All 6 targets (2 files + 4 packages: llm_client, embedder, providers/, retrieval/, parsing/, storage/) successfully ported from drnickv4, stripped clean of ONFA/financial references, py_compiles without errors, test_ports.py 6/6 PASS, GATE_FULL 8/8 exit 0. Spec adherence complete; known deferred items documented.

findings.description: ISSUE-010: agent/providers/ runtime-import deferred (imports from app.config, app.alert_service not yet ported). Acceptable per spec since Phase 1.2 uses py_compile (syntax check), not runtime import. Phase 3+ will resolve when app/ scaffolding lands.
